steps.label: Participant Demographic and Intake Details Entry
steps.description: On this screen, you will enter all required demographic and domain-specific information for each individual participating in the intake process. Please carefully fill out each field, ensuring accuracy and completeness. Guidance is provided for each field, and you will be prompted to search the Master Client Index (MCI) to check for existing records before proceeding. This step helps prevent duplicate entries and ensures all relevant data is captured for intake. Review instructions and confirm all mandatory fields are completed before continuing.

fields.label: Middle Name
fields.error_message: Middle Name must be valid text.

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.error_message: Phone Number must be valid format.

fields.label: Language Preference
fields.error_message: Language Preference must be selected from the list.

data_validation: Birth date cannot be in the future
Phone number must be valid format
If Relationship to Client is 'Child', Date of Birth must indicate minor status
If Relationship to Client is 'Spouse', only one spouse allowed per client
Address must be complete and valid
If Language Preference is 'Other', additional details may be required

buttons.label: Search Master Client Index
buttons.description: Initiate a search in the Master Client Index using the entered demographic information to check for existing records.

steps.label: Search Master Client Index
steps.description: When the Intake Specialist clicks the 'Search Master Client Index' button, the system must search the Master Client Index (MCI) using the entered Name (First Name, Middle Name, Last Name), Date of Birth, and Social Security Number (if available). If one or more matches are found, display a list of matching individuals for selection. If no match is found, prompt the Intake Specialist to create a new client record.

rules.label: Trigger MCI Search
rules.logic: On clicking 'Search Master Client Index', initiate a search in the MCI using the values entered for First Name, Middle Name, Last Name, and Date of Birth. If Social Security Number is available in the system, include it in the search criteria.

rules.label: Display Search Results
rules.logic: If the search returns one or more matches, display a list of matching individuals to the Intake Specialist for selection.

rules.label: Prompt for New Record
rules.logic: If the search returns no matches, prompt the Intake Specialist to proceed to create a new client record.

steps.label: Select Existing Individual or Create New Client Record
steps.description: After searching the Master Client Index, you will see a list of possible matches based on the information you entered. Select the correct individual from the list if they already exist, or choose to create a new client record if no match is found. This step ensures that duplicate records are not created and that all new clients are properly registered. Review the search results carefully before making your selection.

fields.label: Select Individual
fields.error_message: You must select an individual or choose to create a new client record.

data_validation: If no individual is selected, user must proceed to create a new client record
Cannot select more than one individual
Selected individual must match entered demographic data

buttons.label: Create New Client Record
buttons.description: Proceed to create a new client record in the Master Client Index if no suitable match is found.

steps.label: Create New Client Record
steps.description: When the Intake Specialist chooses to create a new client record, the system must create a new entry in the Master Client Index (MCI) with the required fields: Name (First Name, Middle Name, Last Name), Date of Birth, Gender, and Address. Additionally, link domain-specific data such as Relationship to Client, Phone Number, Email, and Language Preference to the new record.

rules.label: Create MCI Record
rules.logic: On clicking 'Create New Client Record', validate that all required fields (First Name, Last Name, Date of Birth, Gender, Address, Relationship to Client) are provided. If validation passes, create a new client record in the MCI with these details.

rules.label: Link Domain-Specific Data
rules.logic: Associate additional domain-specific data (Middle Name, Phone Number, Email, Language Preference) with the newly created client record.
